author: christelle coustier
text: Petit hôtel familial très bien situé, pour les visites. Nous avons être très bien accueilli. La chambre était confortable. Très belle vue de la terrasse et petit déjeuner délicieux !! emplacement de parking, très pratique.

author: Mathieu H.
text:
Mira was a wonderful host, and helpful for discovering Berat and canyon.
Breakfasts on the terrace are great.
Perfectly located to discover Berat and its castle.

author: 17reynaldr
text: A short experience with one night in Berat but it was great, very kind person and the villa was very clean. The private parking is one more thing.|The breakfast with a incredible view !

author: Hedvig Mathiasson
text: Så mysigt hotell med jättegod frukost

author: Venona16
text:
Do Villi trzeba dojść jakieś 40 minut pieszo z postoju busików. Jednakże usytuowana jest w cudownym paśmie domków i restauracji.
Sklepy z pamiątkami i piękne widoki z tarasu sprawiają, że czujesz w tym miejscu szczęście. 😀 Sympatyczna gospodyni wytłumaczyła nam jak najłatwiej dojść do zamku znajdującego się na wzgórzu.
Po drodze spotkaliśmy starszego Pana czekającego na towarzysza do partyjki w szachy. Wszystko ma to taki ponadczasowy klimat jakby czas w tym miejscu nie grał żadnej roli.
Bardzo urocze, i wyjątkowe miejsce do spędzania urlopu. Polecam!

author: Katarzyna M
text: Beautiful view, very good breakfast, very nice and clean room, the owner is very friendly and accomodating. I highly recommend

author: sarah foster
text:
Lovely authentic hotel. Modern bathroom large room on top floor with its own gorgeous balcony.stunnibg views
Friendly owners
Simple fresh breakfast
Great bar onsite

author: Heiko Lorenz
text: Oktober 2025: Toll gelegene, privat geführte Unterkunft mit landestypischen, ausreichendem Frühstück. Die Unterkunft ist modern und sauber, die Herbergseltern freundlich und zuvorkommend. Man kann direkt vor der Tür parken. Von der Unterkunft aus kann man schön die Burg erkunden und findet genügend Restaurants fußläufig. In die Stadt führt eine abschüssige glattgelaufene Pflasterstraße, den Rückweg sollte man bequem mit dem Taxi absolvieren.

author: Ronen Faradian
text: מקום מעולה, יפה, אותנטי. החדרים יפים, המיקום הוא בתוך המתחם של הטירה.חניה בצמוד.

author: Ofer Ben Shalom
text:
Incredible guesthouse.
Located in the walls of the Berat castle, watching an amazing view of the valley & city bellow.

The hosts are incredible, always helping with anything we have needed.

Rooms are simple yet provided exactly what we needed. There are many restaurants nearby, and adjacent parking.

Greatly recommended.

author: Uli Steingruber
text:
Schönstes Guesthouse während unserer Albanientour.
Aldi, der Besitzer ist sehr nett und hilft bei allen Fragen.
Dachzimmer ausgesprochen schön mit guter Aussicht.

author: segev eshel
text:
We had the best time!
The host was super nice and kind!
The rooms were great, and it have the most beautiful view from the castle to Berat.

author: ramona
text:
Posto meraviglioso....pieno di storia e cultura....Camminare tra le mura del Castello di Berat (Kala) è come fare un viaggio indietro nel tempo. La cosa più affascinante è che si tratta di una "fortezza viva": ancora oggi, all’interno delle sue antiche mura, ci sono case abitate, stradine acciottolate e un’atmosfera magica che domina tutta la valle.

La vista che si gode da quassù è semplicemente mozzafiato e ogni pietra racconta secoli di storia, tra chiese bizantine e architettura ottomana. Un luogo unico al mondo, dichiarato Patrimonio dell'Umanità UNESCO, che va assolutamente visitato se siete in Albania! 🇦🇱📸

author: Kanishk
text: Good spot for a quick stop, the high elevation leaves you with fantastic views for the city.

author: Laith MF
text: An ancient historical site with many restaurants and shops selling traditional Albanian items and souvenirs tucked away in its alleyways... absolutely wonderful to spend a pleasant time and enjoy seeing the city at night, and the sunset was also breathtaking.

author: Steffi E.
text: Sehr eindrucksvoll Areal. Der Wehg war etwas schwierig zu finden.

author: Paula Clarke
text: It reminded me of harry potter and it's absolutely unique and georgous little town.

author: Laci Vida
text: Szezonban kocsival felmenni, és parkolót találni szinte lehetetlen. A várban laknak, így séta közben van autó forgalom. Kilátás szép.

author: Nicole Schubert
text: Wunderschöne Gegend mit vielen tollen Eindrücken

author: Ian Walpole
text: Had a lovey coffee in the daytime.

author: Giritlim Butik Otel
text: Berat 'da köprünün karşısında en güzel manzaraya karşı harika kokteyller var.İşletme ,sunum mükemmel.Müzik de müthiş.Teşekkürler.❤️🙏

author: הודיה רונן
text: אחלה של מקום קוקטלים ברמה גבוהה ממש

author: Demal Mégane
text: Je recommande, serveur et service au top !! Les cocktail sont délicieux ! 😋

author: Logan Leclercq
text: Serveur très sympathique , cocktail de qualité , accueil très chaleureux, je recommande fortement 🫶🏽

author: Ian Coulton
text: Fantastic small cocktail bar, super friendly staff, great cocktails at budget frendly prices and awesome music. Would 100% recommend 👌

author: Fabjan Gremshi
text:
This was one of the most nicest bars in berat it was the only one who stayed open after 00:00
Delicious cocktails and a very friendly staff
And very affordable prices
Nice music
And a great atmosphere

author: Johannes Klein
text: Die Betreiber sind sehr gute Gastgeber. An den Chared-Tables kommt man mit den anderen Gäste schnell ins Gespräch und hat einen unvergesslichen Abend!

author: BinBesserAlsDu
text: Best dining experience ever! 😊

author: Nick Z.
text: This is one of the most interesting places I've ever been. Lili as such is a great and funny person who speaks a lot of languages.  His friendlyness and outstanding service is unforgettable. The location is special and the food excellent. It is an absolute "must go" location. Thanks Lili for a great experience combined with exellent food.

author: J R
text: I didn't get to eat there, because it was full (Saturday night), but the host was SO nice to me I need to rate it.

author: Patricia und Manfred
text: Der Besuch dieses Restaurants ist mehr als nur Essen gehen. Lili ist superfreundlich, macht alles noch persönlicher indem er die Gäste immer mit Namen anspricht. Er ist ein wahrer Entertainer. Wir hatten Glück am Shared-Table zu sitzen mit lieben Menschen aus verschiedenen Ländern. So sind neue Kontakte entstanden. Dazu noch das echt sehr schmackhafte Essen, der selbstgemachte Rotwein und Raki, einfach ein tolles Erlebnis und ein unvergesslicher Abend. Danke an Lili und seine Familie ❤️

author: Jeremy Naylor
text: Thank you so much for an amazing evening 🙏

author: J.H.
text: Many thanks to Lili and his family for this unique experience! We had a great diner with people from all over the world. The food was excellent. All the best from Monique and Joel from Germany!

author: Hakan Reis
text: Gerçekten sahibi olan beyefendi çok orijinal bir karakter ve mükemmel bir deneyim sunuyor insana. Biz tek masaydık ve bu sebepten servis harikaydı. Adeta adamın evine akşam misafir olmuşuz gibi bizi ağırladı, yemekler harici kendi yaptığı rakı, şarap ve tüm ürünlerden tattırdı. Kendisi ingilizce yanında anlaşacak kadar da Türkçe biliyor. Rezervasyon şansı pek yok off sezonlarda gitmek biraz daha şansınızı arttırıyor, yemekler ise gerçekten lezzetli. Her bir yemeğin kendi ayrı rahiyası ve aroması var ve tarihi ile alakalı da bilgi veriyor paylaşımları çok güzel. Ben kesinlikle öneririm Berat deneyimimizi eşsiz bir hala getirdi Lili Bey. Sadece bir yemekte domuz ürünü var kendisi bunu belirtip menüden onu çıkartıyor. Tadım menüsü tarzı bir fix menüsü var ve hepsi bölgenin yöresel yemekleri.

author: Janina Kaissermueller
text: Was soll ich sagen, es war eine tolle Erfahrung. Das Essen von Lilis Frau ist Mega. Man kommt mit anderen Leuten zusammen. Es ist einfach eine tollte Atmosphäre etwas ganz was anderes als klassisch in ein Restaurant zu gehen.

author: Bilbo
text: Trato fantástico, sitio estupendo, ojalá tengan mucha suerte con el proyecto

author: Annalisa Ghirotti
text: Io e mia sorella siamo state a cena e abbiamo mangiato benissimo. Locale molto bello, arredato con gusto. Ambiente tranquillo e rilassante. Musica di sottofondo perfetta. Personale estremamente gentile e professionale.

author: Elyn Kim
text: I asked for a Korean-style iced Americano, and they made it perfectly! The atmosphere was elegant, and the decorations were beautiful. I definitely recommend this place to anyone staying in Berat!!

author: Julita Danilczuk
text: We had an amazing evening! 🍷 The staff passionately explained the wines and shared lots of interesting stories and details. The appetizers were delicious and the atmosphere was fantastic !  Definitely a place worth visiting!

author: Elidon Shehu
text: Sehr schön laden top ❤️❤️

author: Jessica Gilbert
text: Great food and great service :)

author: Jumper&Anna
text: Une très jolie décoration en plus d’une ambiance sympa. Serveur très agréable et des plats excellents. Je conseilles vivement !

author: J R
text: The staff was very nice, but I'm afraid I was disappointed by the food.

author: Małgorzata Gancarz
text: Piękne miejsce,  byliśmy poza sezonem alecwarto było przejść całą plażę.

author: Julieta
text:
Como playa es fea, parece que estás en una obra en construcción.
Como paseo marítimo, es muy bonita.

author: Antonio Lezza
text:
Super
Gentilissimi e disponibili
Ottima posizione davanti mare

author: Kutayba Madarati
text: مكان رائع للاقامه ب اسعار مناسبه

author: Eri Cela
text: Nje vend i shkelqyer 💫

author: Polski Gamer
text: Pobyt w hotelu byl bardzo dobry miły właściciel , pomocnyjedzenie w restauracji super i smaczne

author: Amelia Karpińska
text: Super.obsuga ..świetne pokoje ..piekny widok..Właściciel życzliwy ,uśmiechnięty i pomocny .Polecam z całego serca ..Jeszcze dodam ze jedzenie na bardzo wysokim poziomie ,naturalne i zdrowe.

author: A.L.D 18
text: Schönes Hotel in toller Lage mitten in Saranda! Ramiz als Gastgeber war wirklich aufmerksam und hat sich um alles gekümmert, man hat sich sofort wohl gefühlt. Die Zimmer könnten kleine Verbesserungen gebrauchen aber insgesamt war es ein angenehmer Aufenthalt. Gute Wahl für den Preis

author: Sylwia
text: Piękny hotel z cudownym widokiem. Obsługa fantastyczna, obiekt zadbany.

author: Brunilda Fezulla
text: e un resort che ha tutto la pozione il servizio il 🌇 tramonto tutto la panorama le pulizie in camera ogni giorno. ha tutto e il migliore hotel e resort in Albania .

author: prachi kasar
text: Nice service , breakfast was good and many options to chose . Rooms were neat and clean . The view from balcony and beach is just awesome .

author: Laura Urbani
text: Ci siamo trovati davvero bene! Pulizia ottima, colazione buffet fantastica con cucina a vista dove ogni mattina vengono preparate al momento crepes, pancakes, frittelle etc, oltre alla già ampia scelta di pietanze dolci e salate. Ma la cosa che, più di tutto, ci ha lasciato un bel ricordo dell’Hotel Apollon è stata la gentilezza, la disponibilità, l’educazione e i sorrisi di tutto lo staff. Ci siamo sentiti accolti fin da subito! Grazie!

author: Aliza Levy
text:
המלון מרוחק מהטיילת שהיא מקום נהדר לבילוי בערב , אבל זה לא נורא כי נמצאת במרחק של כעשרים דקות הליכה.
החדר בקומה 2 נחמד , אבל חוסר תשומת לב לפרטים הקטנים - במקלחת אין דלת וכל המים מציפים את חדר האמבטיה וזה חבל.
ארוחת הבוקר במרפסת של המלון נפלאה , אוויר נפלא ונוף של החוף והאוכל ממש טעים , כולל הבורק המפורסם של אלבניה .
העובדים מאוד חביבים ונותנים שירות מכל הלב

author: Leticia Letty
text: Excelente Un service impeccable, des plats délicieux, une vue magnifique et un accueil très chaleureux 🥰😍♥️

author: Marjorie Torres
text: El mejor hotel me encanto! Volveré este hotel, el personal muy atento y amable mi estadía fue la mejor los recomiendo a 100%

author: Jacek G
text: Nie wiem jak w sezonie ale w maju cena zdecydowanie atrakcyjna. Śniadanie w porządku, plaza i parking również ogarnięte bardzo dobrze. Ja miałem pokój na 4 piętrze z widokiem na morze. Zdecydowanie zapisuje jako opcje „na kiedyś” bo sprawdzona miejscówka. Saranda trochę rozciągnięta ale jakoś nie było dużego problemu z wyjazdem i powrotami samochodem. Hotel centralnie przy morzu. Jak jest wolne miejsce można zaparkować pod dachem, reszta parkingu odkryta. Pokój czysty, co dzień obsługa ogarnia do południa.

author: mladen lalatovic
text:
Great location.
Super friendly and helpful staff.

author: Imad Zarif
text: Accueil très agréable que ce soit à la réception ou au service bar ou service de ménage.  C'est  dommage que les chambres soient un peu petites mais la présence des balcons compensent. Très bon petit déjeuner... mais manque un micro onde pour chauffer...Le lait pat exp. Bref. Super séjour que je recommencerai.  Merci.

author: Paul Rosner
text:
Haxhi is a fantastic place to eat in Saranda. The food is great, the atmosphere is wonderful, and Emmanuel and his staff are friendly, helpful, and kind!  Great place to dine and enjoy a pretty view!

Ate here again tonight. Delicious dinner, attentive service, lovely atmosphere! Emanuel and his family and staff make you feel valued.

Had another fantastic dinner here. We had mushroom risotto,  creamy chicken pasta, and grilled chicken breast. Delcious bread as well! Fine service and friendly staff!

author: Naomy Garcia
text: Absolutely loved this place! The food was excellent and everything we tried was full of flavor and freshly made. The service was just as amazing, the waitresses were incredibly warm, friendly, and welcoming throughout the whole experience. They even offered us complimentary drinks and fruits, which was such a thoughtful gesture and made us feel really appreciated as customers. The view is also beautiful, and the restaurant is located just a few steps from the beach, which makes the whole experience even better. I would definitely recommend this restaurant to anyone looking for great food, outstanding hospitality, and a lovely atmosphere!

author: Tahlia Hensley
text: Fantastic time at Haxhi for dinner - Generous portion, friendly staff (Fatmir went above and beyond) and very well priced. I would highly recommend!

author: Sarah
text:
Ein rundum perfektes Erlebnis! Der Service ist außergewöhnlich freundlich, aufmerksam und gleichzeitig angenehm unaufdringlich, man fühlt sich sofort willkommen.

Hier stimmt wirklich alles: Man fühlt sich wohl, kann abschalten und genießen. Und das Essen? Ganz klar eine 10/10, geschmacklich auf höchstem Niveau, liebevoll angerichtet und absolut überzeugend.

Wer gutes Essen, eine besondere familiäre Atmosphäre und tollen Service sucht, ist hier genau richtig. Absolute Empfehlung!

author: O Musti
text:
Nice restaurant and super friendly staff.
I would recommend the Linguine Frutti di Mare, as it comes with a tasty tomato sauce and seafood.
Fruit for dessert is included on the house.
"Card payments are not possible, though, so bear in mind to have cash."

author: Sandra Templin
text: Leider wurden wir von 3 Kellnern ignoriert und stehen gelassen, als wir an einen freigeräumten Tisch gingen, wurden wir blöd angemacht, wir sollten draußen warten, die anderen (die von der anderen Seite des Restaurants kamen), würden schon länger warten. Uns hat dieser Umgang gar nicht gefallen, wir sind wieder gegangen. Da sind wir von Albanien bisher anderes gewohnt.

author: Linda Haska
text:
Atmosfere interesante. Bukur.
Faleminderit per mikpritjen.
Mario dhe Linda

author: Rosaria Cristiano
text: Wir sind sehr begeistert gewesen.  Alles ist top. Das Lokal,die Liebe zum Detail.  Der Service top. Das Essen ein Traum. Die Aussicht mega. Wir kommen definitiv wieder.

author: Denis Nightrod
text:
Sehr sehr leckeres Essen,Ambiente mal was ganz anderes es passt voll zu dem Besitzer und zu den Angestellten die voll locker,lustig drauf sind!!!!!
Ich kann es nur empfehlen 😉👍

author: Leona D
text: The food, service, atmosphere and attention to detail is fantastic. The portion sizes are very generous and above all the food is very tasty.  The wine is also gorgeous. A lovely suprise at the end of the meal was a complementary fruit platter which was a lovely addition. I would highly recommend this resturant and will defintley be back.

author: Kanishk
text: The resturant was quite as I think we were pretty late in the afternoon. We got placed at a table as soon as we entered. One thing different here was their menu. They had digital menu's which have a picture of every dish available helping you to make a choice easily. I would recommend the crab claws and squid fry which were very delicious.

author: Kari Oransky
text: Overall great dining experience! We had the Greek salad, shrimp pasta, and fish of the day. Everything was delicious, especially the fish of the day which was grilled to perfection.

author: Ouassil ELRHAZAL
text:
We had dinner in Black Marlin and every single dish we ordered was perfectly executed!
Salads are fresh and unboring, Appetizers were delicious and perfect teaser for the main courses which were simply top-notch!
And above all, the whole staff one by one are professional, attentive to details and extremely welcoming and helpful!
See you again for sure.

author: Abin John
text: We are came here for exploring the sea food varieties and it’s very delicious and the service was amazing overall the experience was amazing

author: mahjabeen zubair
text: Great food! Worth the price xx

author: wendell roche
text: This is a restaurant i will really recommend. We had a wonderful time,  have been taking good care of. Service is wonderful. We had agreed time.

author: Cédrik Rochon
text: Great experience in Saranda!

author: Joanna Smyslo
text:
1. Cudowne miejsce🤩przepyszne jedzonko o niepowtarzalnym smaku🙂wszystko okraszone cudowną atmosferą i pięknym uśmiechem obsługi 😍 za każdym razem odwiedzamy to miejsce i serdecznie polecamy 👍
2. Pierwsza opinia sprzed dwóch lat 🙂 obecna (2)🤩dużo dodać i nic ująć. Nowa lokalizacja 👍Nowy lokal👍Klimat bez zmian, wciąż wspaniały. Można już zjeść też obiadek 🤩
Wszystko smakuje i wygląda wspaniale.
Polecam nadal niezmiennie i wciąż 👍

author: Adam Smyslo
text:
Lokal w nowym miejscu bliżej promenady ale smak i obsługa jak zwykle na najwyższym poziomie👍
Miło i przyjemnie 😀
Śniadania, obiady, kawa, ciasta, wino … pierwsza klasa
Polecam odwiedzić to miejsce 😀

author: Michele Rossi
text: I wanted a nice hearty breakfast to start my day of adventures and LuLu Cafe was the perfect stop - especially if you are a cat lover! The service was amazing and the food was even better! They do take credit card (with additional fee). Stop by, have a great meal and get some kitty time!

author: Romain Ren
text:
Le meilleur café de la ville !!!

On y a pris le petit-déjeuner à 2 reprises : c'était excellent à chaque fois. Les produits sont frais et récupérés localement et on sent que les plats sont préparés avec amour et soin.

Les prix sont légèrement au-dessus de la moyenne, mais ils en valent largement la peine au vu de la qualité. Je recommande personnellement les crêpes et les omelettes.

La serveuse est très agréable et accueillante. Une bouteille d'eau est offerte avec chaque petit-déjeuner, très pratique pour les touristes et le café offre chaque jour une boisson fait maison différente.

author: leszek bejmert
text:
Niespodzianka jest taka że do LuLu Cafe nie trzeba już wchodzić pod górkę... Lokal jest teraz w centrum Sarandy i wszędzie jest blisko. Byłem ze ślubną na kawie i podobało nam się tam bardzo.
Wspaniała atmosfera i rozmowa z Magdą która jest właścicielką tego lokalu sprawiła nam przyjemność.
Szczerze polecam.

author: Mała Mi
text: Śniadaniowe pyszności skradły moje serce ❤️ owsianka z owocami to poezja smaku, tosty, omlety, sałatki, ciasto i coś na trawienie + miła pogawędka z rodakami dała efekt WOW. Serdecznie polecam, również na wieczorną kawkę czy drinka 👍

author: Marco Pesucci
text: Il cibo è delizioso, menomale un posto dove fare una colazione variegata e salutare anche fuori casa. Le ragazze al servizio molto gentili. Super consigliato!

author: Luana Vilhena
text: Lovely breakfast and atmosphere

author: Daria Odrobińska
text:
Zamówiłam makaron z krewetkami i cukinią- było przepyszne! Jeden z lepszych jakie jadłam, a w Sarandzie najlepsze!
Na koniec dostałam tiramisu w formie gratisu! Super obsługa i klimat miejsca, na uboczu dzięki czemu nie ma tu wielu tłumów!

author: Ms Kara Coach K
text:
Excellent crust baked in a fire pit oven. I had the mushroom pie with a glass of red. Generous pour and dog friendly atmosphere with my little dude🐶
Great vibe and wonderful for people watching and chilling after a day of work or play.
I will be back! 🍕🍷🇦🇱📍🐶🙏

author: Jochen Neffe
text:
Ich habe noch nie in einer Pizzeria mit so lustlosen und desinteressierten Servicekräften gesessen. Das betrifft auch den Pizzabäcker. Die Pizza war gut, der Service unter aller Kanone. Mein freundlicher Rat doch ein wenig freundlicher zu Gästen zu sein, Interesse zu zeigen und zu lächeln wurde mit einem gelangweilten Schulterzucken beantwortet.
So betreibt man keine Gastronomie.
Den Stern gibt es nur für die gute Pizza.

author: Michal Bedkowski
text: Smacznie, miło,przystępne ceny. Polecam

author: Michael Canatuan
text: the food is not good..it so disgusting taste..its not yummy..the Pizza are salty..and the owner are so rude!

author: Jurgen Beqiri
text:
Had an amazing experience at Pizzeri Restaurant Lindi during my vacation in Albania! As someone coming from New York, I take pizza seriously, and I can honestly say this was one of the best pizzas I’ve had in my life. The dough was perfect, the ingredients tasted fresh, and every bite was incredible.

What made the experience even better was the warm hospitality. It’s a family-owned business, and the owners made us feel so welcome from the moment we walked in. You can really feel the passion and care they put into both the food and the atmosphere.

I highly recommend this place to every tourist visiting Albania. If you’re looking for amazing pizza, friendly people, and a memorable dining experience, this is the spot to visit! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 🇺🇸🇺🇸🇦🇱🇦🇱

author: Linda Lennartsson
text: Utsikten var fantastisk! Häftigt att se variationen  beroende på vart du flyttade blicken! Men det var väldigt blåsigt vilket tog udden av upplevelsen, tyvärr, men det är inget man kan styra. Själva restaurangen var stängd. Synd att man inte kunde ta ett glas/kaffe och njuta av utsikten.

author: Mica Teasdale
text: Absolutely stuningggg, but then again so is EVERYTHING in Albania 😍 The views from the roof top restaurant are to die for. Highly recommended!

author: Ramunė Braciškienė
text: Puiki vieta palydėti saulę ☀️

author: İbrahim Karataş
text: Gün batımı muhteşem 👌

author: Daniela Rebolledo Oliva
text: Fuimos en Abril. Llegamos para ver el atardecer, fuimos en auto, súper cerca del centro de Sarande. Vistas maravillosas hacia Sarande. Recomendado!

author: Payal Amit
text:
Great experience with Albanian Mini Van Tours! I took the tour on Monday, 18th May from Saranda Promenade, and it was absolutely amazing. The tour covered all the famous nearby places, especially the Blue Eye and the castle, which were truly stunning and unforgettable.

Our tour guide was exceptional. He explained everything in detail about Albania’s history, lifestyle, famous places, food culture, and much more. He was knowledgeable, clear in his explanations, very helpful, and always willing to answer questions.

The entire trip was very comfortable, well organized, and excellent value for money. I had an amazing time and also learned a lot about Albania throughout the journey. They also dropped us at the Ksamil bus station on time, which was very convenient.

Highly recommend Albanian Mini Van Tours to anyone visiting the area. A great experience with comfort, learning, and beautiful places all in one tour!

author: Positano Private Drivers
text: Esperienza indimenticabile. Autista disponibile e preparato. Faccio lo stesso mestiere in Italia ma lui è molto più bravo. Consigliatissimo

author: Chris Bell
text: Excellent tour, very informative and learnt a lot about the Albanian history whilst also seeing some amazing views. Well worth it for a very fair price.

author: A DH
text: Albania minivans tours with Ilir offers excellent guiding in a wide range of topics such as culture, language, and history during the tour. Nice modern vans took us to interesting and beautiful sights and there was a nice balance between free time and group time. A lovely day!

author: Anudhi Lok
text: Had a great time exploring some big landmarks; Lekursi Castle, the blue eye, gjirokaster and more! Ilir was the most wonderful guide. He was super friendly, helpful, kind and had lots of knowledge to share on the sites we visited. Highly recommend ⭐️

author: Amber
text: Ilir was such an amazing host. This is such great value for the day out. It was our best experience in Albania. We thought it was just transport but Ilir provides information at each stop, he answers any questions and gives advice about other great attractions for the rest of your stay. I was nervous as had heard driving in Albania can be a bit scary but I was completely wrong and felt safe the whole time- very comfortable minivan. 10/10, would highly recommend.

author: Bruna
text: Ilir was the best guide! He told us many things about Albanian history, he was kind and helpful! 100% recommend his tours! The tour was lovely, places were beautiful, and the views from the drive back were incredible!

author: Leanne Smith
text: We had a wonderful day tour of Lekursi castle, the blue eye and Gjirokaster. The scenery was beautiful and the castle at Gjirokaster is very well preserved. This is also a good place to buy souvenirs and sample traditional Albanian food. We also stopped at other interesting sights of interest along the way. Our guide Ilir was enthusiastic and welcoming. He was a wealth of knowledge and taught us so much about Albanian history. I’d highly recommend this tour

author: Angela Smith
text:
Today we experienced an amazingly informative and enjoyable day tour from Saranda to Lekursi Castle, Blue Eye and Gjirokaster with Ilir from Albania Minivan Tours.
Ilir shared his vast knowledge of Albanian history and local places of importance with enthusiasm and clarity.
We highly recommend Ilir and Albanian Minuvan Tours. Thank you Ilir for a memorable day.

author: Franck D
text: C’est clairement l’adresse incontournable pour les amateurs de glaces à Sarande. Les glaces sont délicieuses, très parfumées et préparées avec des ingrédients de qualité. Il y a un large choix de parfums, ce qui permet à chacun de trouver son bonheur. En plus d’être excellentes, elles sont vraiment abordables, avec des prix très raisonnables pour la qualité proposée. Le personnel est accueillant et l’endroit est parfait pour une pause gourmande après une balade en ville ou au bord de la mer. Je recommande vivement cette adresse à tous ceux qui passent par Sarande.

author: Mackensie Walker
text: Visited this place multiple times during our stay, ice cream and desserts absolutely delicious. Staff are very friendly and very reasonable prices!

author: Karol Nycz
text: Miła obsługa. Ceny atrakcyjne. Trilece, croissanty z nadzieniem, lody, sok ze świeżych pomarańczy… wszystko super. Szkoda że mało miejsca do siedzenia i że brak porcelany - kawka choć dobra to w papierowym kubeczku. Ale warto.

author: Janina Kaissermueller
text:
Super freundliche und hilfsbereite Mitarbeiter.

Das Trilece war Mega lecker… und wir hatten noch ein Zitroneneis was ebenfalls sehr zu empfehlen ist. Generell sah dort alles sehr sehr lecker aus

Kann es wärmstens empfehlen ❤️❤️

author: Morgan Lemelin
text: Pas les glaces du siècle mais le cornet est bon

author: Ibrahim Nass
text: Very kind service, and very delicious trelece. Highly recommended ✌️

author: Мария Коверчик
text: A very nice place with delicious sweets

author: Manon Abud
text: Best Dubai gelato ever!

author: Chrysoula Vita
text: Πολυ ωραιο μερος! Φαγαμε ενα γλυκο το τριλετσε και μασ αρεσε πολυ! Πολυ ευγενικοι ανθρωποι!

author: Benny Neher
text: Hier kann man leckere Drinks genießen und den wunderschönen Ausblick wirken lassen 🍹🍸

author: Anna Rabuñal
text: Buenas vistas,buena música,personal amabilísimo y variedad de cocktails.

author: Ice Hdd
text:
“Një eksperiencë vërtet fantastike! Pa diskutim, bari më i mirë në Sarandë. 🍸✨
Ambienti është i mrekullueshëm dhe koktejet ishin absolutisht të jashtëzakonshme — kreative, origjinale dhe ndër më të mirat që kemi provuar. Një falenderim i veçantë për George, i cili na shërbeu me shumë profesionalizëm dhe mirësjellje gjatë gjithë mbrëmjes. Edhe barmanët meritojnë komplimente të mëdha për krijimet e tyre unike dhe super të shijshme. Do të rikthehemi patjetër!”

author: Florent GOMES
text:
Un excellent moment passé là-bas, recommandé Georges c’est un bon gars !
Gezuar

author: Thomas Massoni
text: Best bar in Saranda! Thanks to George, best servor and advice! Gazouar!!

author: Munira Ali
text: Nice drinks, helpful staff and amazing view. Perfect combination for good evening.

author: Tanyah Martens
text:
Heerlijke cocktails! Tegen heel mooie prijzen.
Personeel ook heel erg vriendelijk.

author: Titi Sinani
text: An amazing cocktail bar with beautiful décor, incredible views, and a fantastic atmosphere. The cocktails are expertly made, full of flavor, and beautifully presented. Great music, great vibes, and an unforgettable experience. Highly recommended!

author: Mackensie Walker
text:
One of the nicest strawberry daiquiris i’ve had! Beautiful views and reasonable prices

Would have kept visiting if they had blankets for when it gets chilly in the evenings

Music was great if you love house/afro house🙌🏻

author: Carmen Fdez Felices
text: Best of drinks in Sarandë

author: carmen pardo
text: best place for drinks in Sarande

author: alice Krs
text: Such a beautiful place to have a drink. The staff is so friendly and welcoming. Mano is the best, and he made some delicious cocktails for us. Such a great man. Dont miss this spot in Saranda! You will have the best view of the city.

author: pablo ayuza
text: Pasamos una espectacular noche de tragos y sisha con amigos. Excelente música y ambiente

author: Facundoamazon
text: Super nice view, good cocktails and great music, super recommend

author: Gonnza Pinel
text: A bar full of good vibes, very friendly and attentive staff, I went several times and everything was always perfect, good music, good drinks and good atmosphere

author: Unzila Vohra
text: What a cool place! Had sheesha and some drinks, amazing vibe and music

author: Anaïs
text: Best place to go for a drink in Saranda. The cocktails are amazing and you will have the best experience there thanks to Romarjo. He’s honestly the best host ever, he always makes sure you have the greatest time and he’s incredibly nice to all the customers. 💛

author: Marc O.
text: Best happy hour we found. Came here twice to begin the night and the view at sunset is fantastic! All drinks are 600 ALL from 17:00-20:00

author: CookSterTV
text: Fernando is the best wiatrem in the Saranda

author: Hariyali aakash Mehta
text:
Best cafe I find in Sarande. I had cold chocolate and avacado tost and matcha latte with vegan sandwich. Its was delicious and yummy
And Chris give us best service
Thank you so much for this good service

author: Kinjal Khatri
text: Breakfast was amazing with the best view. And special thanks to Chris. Best guy✨

author: Dhumil Maniar
text: Great place with a lovely atmosphere and beautiful view. I had a veg sandwich and coffee, and both were really good. The food was fresh, the coffee was nice, and the overall vibe was relaxing. Definitely a good spot to chill and enjoy with friends.    CRIS was amazing ✌🏻 ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ 5 stars for him

author: Kristjana Qoku
text:
This lounge bar is truly beautiful, with a breathtaking and peaceful view that creates the perfect atmosphere to relax and enjoy the moment. The service is excellent, the products and cocktails are high quality, and the staff is incredibly welcoming, friendly, and polite.

The place is very clean, well organized, and highly attractive, making it one of the best spots to spend your time in Saranda. Whether you want to enjoy a delicious cocktail or simply admire the beautiful sunset by the sea, this is the perfect place to be.

I would highly recommend this lounge bar to everyone visiting Sarandë.

author: Emirjon Skendi
text: Very good bar in Saranda, perfect view

author: Bailey Hein
text: Great service and very kind owner. The coffee and orange juice was delicious and they had oat, soy and almond milk available. Good WiFi too!

author: Amit Khandelwal
text: Cute little cafe with warm service

author: Anton Herrmann
text: People who own this place have truly big hearts and care so much to make you have a good exp. Everything i have tried is amazing. This is a pearl!

author: Lars Mikuta
text: Best breakfast in town, coffee excellent and let's not forget Danny's Raki 😁 We loved it thank you Danny and staff 👍👍👍👍👍👍

author: Oliver
text: Best breakfast in town. Super friendly staff, amazing food and good coffee. All very good value. Feta omelette is especially good. Good vegetarian options.

author: Ka
text: Wir hatten das Omelette mit Feta und das albanische Frühstück, war alles sehr lecker und frisch 😊 Brot war auch fantastisch gut! Der nette Besitzer war auch äußerst freundlich und hat uns kleine süße Glückkekszettel geschenkt. Wir kommen als Truppe sehr gerne wieder.

author: Kevin Ramberg
text: Nous sommes venus par hasard prendre 2 thés froids, ils étaient vraiment bons, le patron vraiment très gentil et accueillant 👍 merci

author: Morgan Lemelin
text: très gentil et le chocolat chaud est très bon!

author: Hani Taher
text: Good food, nice staff! Did not ask for me to write a review, so that is why iam leaving an Honest review. The brunch was good, price quality was good and the waiter was next level nice! He knows how to treat customers and ask the right questions. 1 critical point is that i wish they had more places outside.

author: Mateusz Rusyn
text: Great sandwich, good service, huge recommendation for breakfast

author: Adrian Kotkowski
text: Best breakfast in Albania

author: Bash Oshiafi
text: Great service. Very quick and responsive waiting. I recommend

author: Alina Gounina
text: Very tasty and great atmosphere! Good for a rainy day as well 👍

author: Mackensie Walker
text: We ordered the chicken and waffles with oat milk freddo cappuccino and both were delicious! A lovely little brunch spot and great to support a small local business.

author: Theresa Anderson
text: Really good Flat White with Oatmilk, made with lots of love and the food was also really nice. They also have oatmeal with plantbased milk 😃

author: The Astonishing Kyle Jackson
text: The breakfast was amazing. I order the crepes with a mushroom and chicken sauce and the breakfast utterly spectacular all for a low price. And the items on the menu made me want to stick around for lunch and dinner! Great low prices in the heart of the city center of Saranda. I highly recommend Zum Cafè!

author: Aman Sood
text: Go to breakfast place while here in Albania, really accommodating for allergies and intolerances

author: May F.
text: Albanian coffee ! Super !

author: Richard Andhika
text: We come here before we have to leave for Saranda, very good coffie and very nice owner.

author: Ben Graham
text: Lovely staff, delicious coffee!

author: Giovanna Mece
text: Great coffee, fast service, and a nice place to sit and unwind. Loved the overall experience—will definitely come back!

author: Mounira Lamine
text:
Amazing juice and very friendly owner
Will definetely come back

It may be saying it’s closed but it’s open just come guys !!

author: tedi papadatos
text: Arjan is the best! Best coffee in town and the best prices too!

author: Audrey Lo
text: The best coffee in Saranda!

author: Anaïs
text: Claudio and the team are very welcoming with good vibes and nice ambiance…also pretty good Dj! It’s a perfect place if you want to dance or also chill and enjoy a cocktail or a good beer. One of my fav in Saranda :)

author: Schlin3
text: Redi ist the best, the service is really good here. The drinks are tasty and the view ist the best.

author: Anne Blaeser
text: Super nettes Personal, sehr zuvorkommend und tolles Ambiente.

author: Unzila Vohra
text: Loved the vibe! Amazing place and great music❤️☺️

author: Silke Schöddert (Sdd)
text: Die Aussicht und der DJ waren gut, die Bedienung eher desinteressiert und die Cocktails sind wirklich schlecht zu überhöhten Preisen. Es wird mehr abgerechnet als auf der Karte steht und das Trinkgeld zieht die Bedienung einfach selbst vom Wechselgeld ab. Keine Empfehlung

author: sara bushati
text: great place amazinggggg

author: Dea Mullahaj
text: stafi shume i sjellshem , pijet shumm yummy 😋

author: Renu Patel
text: Absolutely wonderful performance with a truly wonderful cast who put their heart and soul into it. Loved every moment. Don’t miss it!

author: Richard Andhika
text: What a way to end our last avond at Tirana, immersive and entertaining. Time flies by. You all did a good job!!

author: buffi hendrix
text: Best part of our visit to Albania! Do not miss this show.

author: Mackenzie Carr
text: SO FUN. A must do for people visiting Albania!

author: Janki Patel
text: Amazing experience we had over here

author: Gage Mele
text: Absolutely amazing experience! Beautiful show of song and dance! Can’t recommend enough, an absolute must see if visiting Albania

author: Ebrar ERDOĞAN
text: Eski ve yeni şehrin karışımı.

author: Christy Miller
text:
Gigantic and peaceful. A fabulous tribute to a national hero.
Not to be missed.

author: beauty sandra igene
text: I'll visit again. There's a construction ongoing around the square. Theres an event towards May ending. I love T sign is gated. You can't take clear pictures at the moment. Around the square you have the museum, I love EU sign . The mountain . Intercontinental hotel is an iconic landmark. There's a long road by the square beautiful and alot of restaurants around. I highly recommend Tirana. I'll visit again.

author: Alessandro Castagna • 3 2 1
text: Si sente la storia e l’arte che contraddistingue questo paese, un luogo contornato da elementi contrastanti tra cultura e passato tragico

author: G Walker
text: Must visit, beautiful and absolutely massive park filled with monuments, benches and even some shops. Morning and evening walks here are highly recommended.

author: shiaowei z
text: This is a great park, it’s quite big so it’s easy to spend a lot of time here. I haven’t been here many times but everytime I go, I thoroughly enjoy my experience. Although the lake looks kind of funky….i still really appreciate the existence of the lake. tiny warning, the public restrooms throughout the park are like the craziest looking toilets I have ever seen in my life so just please please pee before u come here. If you have ever seen Trainspotting, the toilets here are comparable to that one scene. Anyways, this is a WONDERFUL picnic spot in tirana

author: Caterina Masala
text: Un sito molto bello, pulito e suggestivo

author: Agi Máslo
text: Krasne misto na piknik nebo nejakou vychazku. Zachody jsem moc nepochopila, ale nejake tam jsou. Jsou tu i nejake kavarny a restaurace.

author: Radha Hirani
text: Lovely place for walk

author: Zeki Taşdemir
text:
Tirana Kalesi’nin içinde yer alan Oping’s, hem konumu hem de atmosferiyle şehrin en keyifli duraklarından biri. Tarihi dokunun içinde modern ve canlı bir ortam sunuyor.
Menüde kahvaltıdan burgerlere, salatalardan atıştırmalıklara kadar geniş seçenekler var ve genel olarak lezzetler beklentiyi karşılıyor. Kokteyller de oldukça başarılı. Fiyatlar lokasyona göre biraz yüksek sayılabilir ama ortam ve deneyim bunu büyük ölçüde telafi ediyor.
Servis çoğu zaman hızlı ve personel güler yüzlü. Özellikle yoğun saatlerde biraz bekleme olsa da çalışanların ilgisi iyi.
Genel olarak hem gündüz kahvesi hem de akşam keyifli vakit geçirmek için Tirana’da kesinlikle uğranması gereken, enerjisi yüksek bir mekan.

author: Jul Saraçi
text: Mellisa is a great host, I fully recommend this Place

author: sara muca
text: Best place in Tirana, Melisa is a fantastic host, she is very nice and kind.100% recomended.

author: Kristjan Careri
text: Nice place in Tirana, Melisa was a great host for the evening. Fully recommend it

author: Ergisa Rrapaj
text: Amazing service! Melisa was fantastic and took great care of us

author: Kristina Menko
text: Melisa ❤️ me e mira Top

author: Steve C
text: I'm from USA and this place is The Place. Not trying to be glitzy..Just has a strong and comforting nostalgia vibe. There's a separate cool patio for smokers. The music is so cool...curated by a dj and not the usual stuff. It sits in the background. Try this place and say hi to Red the owner who worked in the industry in Italy before coming home to Tirana. Remember when I said this is The Place? Yeah.

author: Eslem ALTINTAŞ
text: Harikaydıı kokteyl içtik patates yedik. Fıstık ikram edildi. Balkan kokteyli içtik alkol oranı çok iyiydi. Atmosferi müziklerini çok sevdim.

author: Verena Bach
text: Sehr süße Bar, tolles Ambiente! Zu essen hatten wir nichts, aber tolle Stimmung und netter „Innenhof“

author: Ana
text: Really nice place with interesting interior. The cocktails are tasty and the food is delicious. However, the music was too loud and almost impossible to have a conversation.

author: Manuel Lopez
text: Super bar dans ce quartier si significatif. Bon moment passé

author: Jani Juhola
text: Best atmosphere in Tirana 👌

author: Max rojo
text:
Fantastic shisha experience, very high quality!!
Could you tell me the brand of shisha you use?
Thank you for your reply.

author: אלי
text:
כמיטב המסורת עצרתי לעשן נרגילה בביקור בטירנה.
מקום נחמד מאוד, שקט.
בשעות הצהריים כמעט ולא היו אנשים במקום.
מבחר סוגי טבק שאת חלקם לא הכרתי.
לקח קצת זמן עד שהכינו אבל היה שווה לחכות.
מחיר סביר - 50 ש״ח ראש.
בסהכ ביקור נחמד בהשוואה למדינות אחרות שהייתי.

author: Chandramauli Chaudhuri
text: Loved the vibe. Super cool and chilled out place to spend a relaxed evening at Tirana with friends.

author: carlotta
text: Todo muy bien, sitio con goteras y la shisha 5€ más que en la carta

author: Cy Cy
text: Amazing place ! Alketi was amazing , great customer service and very helpful! Will visit again!

author: Halima Hashim
text: Alket was very nice and made the experience so much fun!

author: Chad13 Abdou
text: Parfait pose avec ma femme très bon moment agréable au calme 😊

author: Birkan Y.
text:
Fiyatlar bir tık pahalıydı. Nargilesinin aroması silik ancak kullandıkları nargile takımları iyi olduğu için iyi duman performansı aldım.
Aroma yoğunluğu da olsa gerçekten değecek bir mekan.

author: Sabela Berisha
text: The purple hair waitress was sooo nice and funny i never felt more welcomed it felt like a friend was bringing me breakfast and not some employee who gets paid to do so , cant wait to be back and be served by her

author: Ezgi Alkışoğlu
text: Everyone was very helpful. We came almost every day during our trip. I highly recommend Tony's special egg.Everything was wonderful. Thank you so much.

author: Dennis Drijver
text: Hier een koffie gedaan. Deze waren prima!

author: Mariama Jammeh kinteh
text:
We had a wonderful experience at Tony’s Restaurant. The staff were very attentive from the moment we arrived, making us feel welcomed and well looked after throughout our visit.
The food was delicious , well presented, and full of flavour.
Overall, great atmosphere, great service, and excellent food. I would definitely recommend Tony’s Restaurant and will be coming back again.

author: Kafree JK
text:
​Tony's was the very first restaurant we visited when we arrived, and it has been our absolute favorite ever since! The food is amazing, but the staff is even more incredible. They truly made us feel at home and always welcomed us with the biggest smiles. Honestly, if you come to Tirana, you cannot miss out on Tony's!

​Faleminderit family, we are going to miss you so much, but we will be back very soon! Të dua! ❤️

author: Levi Hoonings
text: The food is so good! Big portions for a very good price. We had some mexican burito and chicken fajita. It was amazing!

author: Hasan Efe Kayık
text: Bizi hep güler yüzü ile karşılayan İrini mekana gelmemizi daha da etken kıldı. Yolunuz düşerse uğrayın ve İrini’den kahve için….

author: Elda Prence
text: Had an excellent brunch today! Would visit again.

author: Ayhan Kaya
text: Güler yüzlü çalışanlar ile birlikte bizi hep güler yüzü ile karşılayan İrini mekana gelmemizi daha da etken kıldı. Yolunuz düşerse uğrayın ve İrini’den kahve için….

author: Marvin Diogo
text:
We visited the restaurant yesterday for breakfast with a group of 7 people, and we were all absolutely impressed. The food was excellent – fresh, delicious, and beautifully presented. We also really liked the location: a lovely atmosphere where you immediately feel comfortable.
We would especially like to highlight the service. Aferdita was extremely friendly, attentive, and incredibly welcoming. You could really tell that she enjoys her job and treats guests with genuine kindness. She made our visit even more enjoyable.
We all felt very welcome and will definitely come back again. Highly recommended!

author: Totila Kuqi
text: Ambjent fantastik 👏👏

author: aleksandra1t
text: During my stay in Albania this place has become some sort of my comfort place, as it’s close to my hotel and price wise very affordable - cause of all that they saw me there everyday. The food is tasty, staff is exceptionally friendly and the vibes are there.

author: Iron Dude
text: The food was ok but not great. Service was decent but rather slow. I wouldn't recommend this place due to the prices. Also waited 15min+ for the bill that was annoying since the place wasn't busy at all and we wanted to move on.

author: Gianna De Cosmis
text: Esperienza unica, ogni volta che vengo a Tirana è una tappa fissa. Il cornetto al pistacchio una vera goduria e  il personale gentilissimo!!!! Provare per credere!!!!

author: M Cl
text: Great coffee, great service and unique menu items, a great and chilled experience.

author: Evelina Mexi
text: Such a good experience

author: Andrea Settembrini
text: Ottimo cibo e ambiante 💪

author: edmond ulbani
text:
Cibo e materie prime selezionate e curate!
Il gelato con olio di oliva e sale è speciale😍
Le ragazze sono sorridenti e molto accoglienti🌺 ottimo ambiente dentro e fuori!

author: Robert Ventura
text: Cuidado turista, si no llevas efectivo en Leks, y llevas euros, te intentarán cobrar de más.  Te dirán que la tarjeta no te funciona y te querrán cobrar en Euros con sobrecargo. Una pena, el turismo es un nuevo motor de su economía, pero siempre ha habido y habrá gente que se aprovecha

author: Kapkapchmurko
text: Food was tasty but we waited 1 hour for it at 12 am, and there weren't many people at that time 😄 Still worth a visit but be prepared that you need to wait a bit long

author: Muhammad “Ray” Rahman
text: oh, can I say… One of the best experiences, one of the best servers, one of the best atmospheres and vibes that we have had in Tirana so far! Our server, Redi, was excellent, friendly and should be employee of the month every month! Thanks guys and we will be back again for sure!

author: Jörg Eichhorn
text:
Kometiti is a nice place but they are cheated us. Somehow it was rediculous, we did a Raki Tasting - 8 shots. Second round shot glases half size as  of the first round. When we complained we got the explanation that the first round was a mistake and that we were lucky. But we observed others ordering Raki received the bigger glases as we at the 1. Round. Same mistake again????
So, take care, doing a Raki Tasting!
Manager and Staff are very well educated, giving explanation.....

author: Kryštof Bohuslav
text: Terrible service, took an hour to order a Beer, avoid it in busy times.

author: Wayne O'Connor
text: Awful service, waited 45 minutes for a single drink and asked 3 times just to be constantly ignored on top of being overpriced.

author: Thomas Cuscito
text: Service très lent.. spritz sans goût.. à éviter 😅

author: Hans Lemmers
text: Matige servies heel erg lang wachten op je bestelling ( anderhalf uur op eten) erg in efficiënt

author: Vibeke Rivet
text: Great treats and coffee! Adjola was a great server!

author: Lilly Kolb
text: Adjola was a sweetie, the food was so good and they serve you right at your seat!

author: Addison
text: Ushqimi dhe pijet ishin shume te Mira dhe gjithashtu goca qe na sherbeu Adjola ishte shume e sjellshme keni nje staff fantastic.

author: Ersa Hebeja
text: Ambjent i kendshem, ushqim i mire dhe vajza qe na sherbeu, Adjola ishte shume e sjellshme.

author: Joana Llato
text: Nje eksperience shume e mire tek d angelo , Goca qe na sherbeu Adjola ishte shume e sjellshme👌

author: Klara Cmeta
text: "Ëmbëlsirat më të mira në qytet! Çdo gjë që kemi porositur ishte super e freskët dhe e shijshme. Shërbimi ishte i shpejtë dhe stafi shumë i sjellshëm(Fabiola)

author: satbere cengu
text: Ambient i bukur dhe staf i sjellshem goca qe na sherbeu ishte Fabiola

author: Ergis Elmazi
text: Das Dessert-Restaurant war wirklich hervorragend. Die Atmosphäre war angenehm, die Süßspeisen waren frisch und unglaublich lecker. Besonders hervorheben möchte ich den Service – Fabiola war sehr freundlich, aufmerksam und außerdem wunderschön. Man hat sich direkt willkommen gefühlt. Ich komme auf jeden Fall wieder!

author: aurel hasani
text: Ambient shume i qete dhe i bukur stafi shume i mire dhe ndihmues sidomos Fabiola

author: Brandon Marquez
text:
Hana Corner Cafe is truly one of Tirana’s gems. From the moment you walk in, the atmosphere feels vibrant, welcoming, and full of life. It has a creative, cozy energy that makes it just as perfect for brunch with friends as it is for a coffee break, a casual drink, or a relaxed afternoon out. I also really appreciate that it is a genuinely queer friendly space, which adds to the overall feeling of comfort and inclusivity.

Their drink menu is one of the highlights. They offer a great range of craft drinks, from well made coffee to creative cocktails, so it works beautifully whether you are starting your day or easing into the evening. The daily brunch menu has also been recently updated, and the added variety really shows. There are thoughtful options for different tastes and dietary restrictions, which makes it easy to recommend to almost anyone.

The staff are consistently amazing. Everyone I have interacted with has been kind, helpful, and welcoming. They are happy to answer questions, make recommendations, and make the whole experience feel easy and enjoyable.

A helpful note for visitors: Hana Corner Cafe is cash only. If you need an ATM, the staff can point you to one nearby. Paying in Lek is the better option since the Euro conversion is not ideal, but they do accept Euro when needed, which is still a nice plus.

Overall, Hana Corner Cafe is a warm, colorful, inclusive spot with great drinks, delicious brunch, and genuinely wonderful people. It is the kind of place that quickly becomes a favorite, and I would happily recommend it to anyone looking for a special cafe experience in Tirana. Easily 5 stars.

author: Valentin
text: One of best coffee shops in whole Tirana

author: Eileen Healy
text:
Cash only - there's an ATM close by.
Our order was a little slow BUT the food and coffee were great and staff were really helpful and friendly.

author: Dr Ekonomiks
text: Cosy and British style coffee house. If you crave flat white coffee you can get proper one here

author: Tom Preval
text: This is a very cool, very intimate coffee spot. Coffee was fantastic & the vibe was cool.

author: Joseph Pettit
text: Very warm and welcoming
